vocab.example: The lack of standardized sizing across different brands makes buying footwear online a bit of a gamble.

vocab.meaning: chính sách đổi trả dễ dàng/không phiền hà
vocab.example: I only frequent e-commerce sites that offer a hassle-free return policy in case the shoes don't fit comfortably.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác hối hận sau khi mua hàng
vocab.example: I experienced a minor case of buyer's remorse after realizing the color of the sneakers was much louder than in the photos.

vocab.meaning: đợt mở bán sản phẩm phiên bản giới hạn
vocab.example: I once stayed up until midnight to participate in a limited-edition drop of a famous designer collaboration.

vocab.meaning: sự dễ dàng khi điều hướng (trên trang web)
vocab.example: The navigational ease of modern shopping apps allows me to browse thousands of pairs within minutes.

vocab.meaning: cửa hàng truyền thống (có mặt bằng vật lý)
vocab.example: Although I love online deals, I still visit a brick-and-mortar store to try on specialized running shoes.
I managed to snag a pair of high-quality leather boots at half price during a 2-hour flash sale.
One has to be vigilant against scam artists who set up sophisticated fake websites to steal banking details.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm mở hộp sản phẩm
vocab.example: Premium brands often focus on the unboxing experience, using elegant packaging to impress the customer.

vocab.meaning: thông tin vận chuyển/bản kê khai giao hàng
vocab.example: I always double-check the shipping manifesto to ensure there are no hidden customs charges for international orders.
